title: Sizzling Kenyan Pork Stir-fry
description: A fresh, pillowy stir-fry with halal-certified pork, vibrant bell peppers, and a sweet-savory glaze that feeds a crowd.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large wok over high heat until shimmering.
Add the minced garlic and ginger, stir-frying for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the sliced pork and stir-fry until the edges start to brown, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced onions and bell peppers, continuing to stir-fry for another 4 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
Pour in the soy sauce and honey, tossing the mixture so everything is evenly coated.
Reduce the heat to medium and let the stir-fry simmer for 2 minutes to meld flavors.
Check the internal temperature of the pork; it should reach 145°F (63°C) and no longer be pink.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, stirring to combine.
Remove from heat and transfer the sizzling pork stir-fry to a serving dish.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving hot.
